description: Get ready to experience comfort like never before with these New Port floaters from fila. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail. UpperSynthetic upper with fabric fore foot straps and one ankle strap, with velcro fasteners for easy adjustment to attain a snug FitFabric collar strapCushioned inners for greater comfortEmbossed logo on the side of the ankle strap for styleCurved and textured footbedOutsoleTPR outsole with waffle patterned grooves for greater durability and stabilitySandal careWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in sirect sunlight
